name: accessibility
appliesWhen: agent role is product-designer OR any UI task (web, Angular, or Flutter)

officialRepos.name: w3c/wcag
officialRepos.why: Source of WCAG 2.2 success criteria, understanding docs, and techniques.

officialRepos.name: w3c/aria-practices
officialRepos.why: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide — correct keyboard + ARIA patterns for custom widgets.

officialRepos.name: dequelabs/axe-core
officialRepos.why: Automated a11y rules engine for CI; catches ~30-40% of issues, complements manual testing.

officialRepos.name: angular/components
officialRepos.why: Angular CDK a11y module: FocusTrap, LiveAnnouncer, FocusMonitor; accessible Material components.

officialRepos.name: flutter/flutter
officialRepos.why: Semantics/MergeSemantics/ExcludeSemantics widgets and accessibility tooling for Flutter UI.

officialRepos.name: GoogleChrome/lighthouse
officialRepos.why: Accessibility audit integrated into CI/devtools for regression catching.
